fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> replaces a specific color in a font's CPAL palette when creating a typeface via <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments" />. The <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Index" /> identifies the palette entry and <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Color" /> provides the replacement ARGB value.

## Examples

```csharp
var overrides = new SKFontPaletteOverride[]
{
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = 0xFFFF0000 }
};
var args = new SKFontArguments { PaletteOverrides = overrides };
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies an override for a single color entry in a font color palette.

fields.value: The ARGB color value (<c>sk_color_t</c>) to use for this palette override.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the replacement ARGB color value for the palette entry.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified value is equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> is equal to the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> and equals the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns the hash code for the current instance.

fields.value: The index of the color entry within the font palette.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the palette color entry to override.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> instances are equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride left, SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride right);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two instances are not equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> instances are not equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride left, SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride right);
